# vendor/gol-wasm

Generated by `pnpm build:wasm` from the
[`wasm-game-of-life`](https://github.com/tgianella/game-of-life) Rust crate.
**Do not edit by hand** — changes will be overwritten on the next build.

Committed to the repo so CI / hosting providers don't need a Rust toolchain.
Rebuild locally after touching the crate.
